project_subtitle: Helping you return to your missed prayers and fasts, gently and sustainably.
why_body: Awdah was born from a desire to make the journey of making up missed worship (Qada'a) less overwhelming. We believe in high-quality, privacy-first tools that respect the sanctity of your spiritual journey.
who_body: Whether you are returning to practice after a long break, or simply keeping track of a few missed days, Awdah provides the structure and motivation to help you stay consistent.

features.title: Salah Monitoring
features.body: Detailed tracking of missed obligatory prayers with a clear view of your remaining debt.

features.title: Sawm Tracking
features.body: Log missed fasts with specific support for Ramadan recovery and voluntary days.

features.title: Hijri First
features.body: Built around the Islamic calendar with accurate dual-date support for all entries.

features.title: Full Arabic Support
features.body: First-class Right-to-Left (RTL) experience in both English and Arabic.

features.title: Privacy First
features.body: Your data is yours. Secure, encrypted, and designed with minimal data collection in mind.

features.title: Educational Path
features.body: Curated resources to understand the religious rulings and wisdom behind Qada'a.

team.name: Amgad Mahmoud
team.bio: Cloud Engineer based in Germany with 5 years of experience building serverless SaaS on AWS. Passionate about Clean Architecture, DDD, and building tools that serve the community.
